title: Pipeline Use Cases
content_html:
Deprecated: Pipeline Use Cases

Status:

  • retired workbook-led workflow guide
  • kept only as an archive stub so old docs links do not break

This page no longer documents a current workflow. Current catalogue maintenance uses Studio-backed canonical JSON source records, the configured bulk-import workbook for new records, and scoped JSON build previews/runs.

Current references:

  • Studio
  • Catalogue Source Utilities
  • Build Catalogue JSON
  • Data Models: Catalogue
